svg.title: recoverlite workflow
svg.desc: A declared design and analysis pair with declared assumptions is simulated over a crossed grid of null, target and perturbed scenarios; simulation diagnostics are converted into a three-way PASS, RISK or FAIL verdict under a versioned threshold profile.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Test the design before collecting the data
